prompt: A realistic smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT web interface in Japanese, shown on a clean white background. Centered in the chat is a single generated image: a top-down photo of 1 Japanese newspaper placed neatly on a medium-dark wooden tabletop with rounded table corners visible. The newspaper dominates the image and looks highly believable, like a fake but convincing breaking-news front page. The masthead area is dense and traditional, with a huge bold black Japanese headline across the top reading 「高市総理辞任」. Beneath it is a large main photo of 1 politician at a press conference podium with multiple microphones, face intentionally blurred or obscured, in front of a dark blue curtain. Along the right side is 1 vertical blue newspaper nameplate area with white Japanese text resembling a major national daily. A tall vertical subheadline column in Japanese runs beside the main image, suggesting discussion of a successor candidate. The front page includes exactly 4 visible advertisement blocks near the bottom and lower side areas, 1 small portrait photo of a suited man in a left-side article, 1 sports photo block in the lower middle, 1 weather or data box on the right, and many tightly packed columns of Japanese body text throughout. The newspaper should feel authentic, serious, and editorial, with realistic print texture, slight page curl, subtle shadows, and credible Japanese typography. Around the image, include the visible ChatGPT UI chrome: top-left “ChatGPT”, top-right Japanese sharing controls, a small circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left corner of the image, a small share-style overlay icon at the lower-right corner of the image, reaction/action icons beneath the image, and a bottom input bar with Japanese placeholder text 「質問してみましょう」 plus microphone and voice buttons. Overall style: photorealistic screenshot, modern web app interface, fake-news newspaper front page, crisp legible layout, natural lighting, minimal perspective distortion.
